author: Maxwell Cohn
description: Add spreadsheet-style formulas to Markdown tables. Write a formula into a cell, run a command to bake it into a computed value with the formula preserved in a comment for later editing. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Maxwell Cohn
manifest.description: Add spreadsheet-style formulas to Markdown tables. Write a formula into a cell, run a command to bake it into a computed value with the formula preserved in a comment for later editing.
manifest.name: Simple Table Formulas
